name: Everyware API
description: Everyware is a Pay by Text platform providing a JSON-based asynchronous REST API for managing businesses, contacts, messages, payments, invoices, subscriptions, and merchant onboarding. The API supports SMS/MMS messaging, payment processing, invoice management, and identity verification.
